phases.title: PR 0 — Scaffolding (no behavior change)
phases.scope: Replace DISTILL RED scaffolds with thin real implementations of events.ts, backend-client.ts, dispatchers/index.ts, frontend dispatcher.ts, eventHandler.ts (skeleton — no cases handled), MockSSESource. Wire DispatchContext plumbing in agent/lib/chat/handleChat.ts. Build the Groq fixture-replay harness (UI-2 resolution). Decide schema location per TWD-8 (default: option 1 verbatim duplicate + sync test).
scenarios_to_unskip: agent/test/chat/acceptance/worker-tool-dispatch.test.ts :: PR 0 — scaffolding contract :: ChatEventSchema parses every event the worker may emit
agent/test/chat/acceptance/worker-tool-dispatch.test.ts :: PR 0 — scaffolding contract :: Worker forwards JWT via auth-proxy when calling backend
phases.files_changed_estimate: agent: events.ts, backend-client.ts, dispatchers/index.ts, handleChat.ts (modify); fixtures/groq-replay.ts. frontend: events.ts, dispatcher.ts, eventHandler.ts, mockSSESource.ts. ~400-500 LoC.
exit_criteria: All PR 0 scenarios green
Walking skeleton remains @skip but its imports resolve
Zero __SCAFFOLD__ markers remaining in files PR 0 owns
agent build + frontend build green
No production behavior change observable to a user

phases.title: PR 1 — Cleaning tools migrated to worker dispatch (UNBLOCKS api-driven-user-flow-tests)
phases.scope: Implement agent/lib/chat/dispatchers/cleaning.ts: trimWhitespace, standardizeCase, fillNulls, mapValues, applyCleaningTransform. All emit transform_applied. Add transform_applied + error_occurred + turn_done cases to frontend eventHandler.ts. Delete corresponding cleaning-tool branches in frontend/src/core/toolCalls/executeToolCall.ts. Un-skip the walking skeleton.
scenarios_to_unskip: agent/test/chat/acceptance/worker-tool-dispatch.test.ts :: PR 1 — cleaning tools dispatch via worker (3 scenarios)
phases.files_changed_estimate: agent: dispatchers/cleaning.ts (new), tools.ts (remove cleaning defs), handleChat.ts (attach dispatchers). frontend: eventHandler.ts (3 cases), executeToolCall.ts (delete cleaning branches). ~300-400 LoC.
exit_criteria: All PR 1 scenarios green (including walking skeleton when GROQ_API_KEY present)
PR 0 scenarios still green
Existing chat UX unchanged (manual smoke: trim a column via chat in dev)
AC1.4 grep guard passes (no chat refs in backend/app/)
Polecat MUST file a follow-up bead: "Unblock api-driven-user-flow-tests — revise its DESIGN per the new protocol"

phases.title: PR 2 — Row + column mutations migrated to worker dispatch
phases.scope: Implement agent/lib/chat/dispatchers/mutations.ts: addRow, deleteRow, renameColumn, undoCleaningTransform, reEnableCleaningTransform. Emit row_added / row_deleted / column_renamed / transform_undone (with mode) / transform_re_enabled. Add corresponding cases to frontend eventHandler.ts. Delete mutation branches in executeToolCall.ts.
scenarios_to_unskip: agent/test/chat/acceptance/worker-tool-dispatch.test.ts :: PR 2 — row and column mutations dispatch via worker (6 scenarios)
phases.files_changed_estimate: agent: dispatchers/mutations.ts (new), tools.ts (remove mutation defs), handleChat.ts (attach dispatchers). frontend: eventHandler.ts (5 cases), executeToolCall.ts (delete mutation branches). ~350-450 LoC.
exit_criteria: All PR 2 scenarios green
PR 0 + PR 1 scenarios still green
Walking skeleton still green
AC1.4 grep guard passes

phases.title: PR 3 — UI directives migrated; legacy code deleted
phases.scope: Implement agent/lib/chat/dispatchers/ui.ts: sortTable, filterTable, replaceColumnFilters, clearFilters. UI-only — no backend calls. Emit sort_directive / filter_directive / filters_cleared. Add cases to frontend eventHandler.ts. Modify direct-UI click handlers (column header sort/filter) to call applyDirective. DELETE frontend/src/core/toolCalls/executeToolCall.ts entirely. Remove default-throws from eventHandler.ts (every variant now handled). Final cleanup of any legacy parser branches in chatStream.ts.
scenarios_to_unskip: agent/test/chat/acceptance/worker-tool-dispatch.test.ts :: PR 3 — UI directives dispatch via worker (3 scenarios)
frontend/src/core/chat/__tests__/acceptance/fe-event-vocabulary.test.tsx :: PR 3 — UI directive event reactions (4 scenarios)
phases.files_changed_estimate: agent: dispatchers/ui.ts (new), tools.ts (remove UI defs), handleChat.ts. frontend: eventHandler.ts (3 cases + remove default-throws), executeToolCall.ts (delete entire file), direct-UI click handlers (modify to call applyDirective). ~300-400 LoC + significant deletions.
exit_criteria: All scenarios across all PRs green (every previously-skipped test now runs and passes)
Walking skeleton still green
executeToolCall.ts deleted (file removed; imports redirected or removed)
AC2.1 exhaustiveness type-test green
AC1.4 grep guard passes
Manual UX smoke: chat-driven sort works, click-driven sort works, both via the same applyDirective body
Polecat MUST file a follow-up bead: documentation review for AC4.3 (revise api-driven-user-flow-tests/design/design.md §2 and §10 per the simpler shape)

manual_review_gates.title: Confirm api-driven-user-flow-tests can resume
manual_review_gates.description: AC4.3 — verify that docs/feature/api-driven-user-flow-tests/design/design.md §2 (Python tool dispatcher wrinkle) is now deletable and §10 worked example collapses to 'send prompt, observe events, query state'. NOT blocking the merge of this feature, but is the value-validation step that proves K4.
